testcase.name: testSimpleAlert
testcase.system-out: 14:25:27 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.AlertsTest - === Starting AlertsTest suite === 14:25:27 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.AlertsTest - Browser launched successfully 14:25:27 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.AlertsTest - Creating new page and navigating to Alerts page 14:25:28 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.AlertsPage - Initializing AlertsPage locators 14:25:28 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.AlertsPage - Navigating to Alerts page 14:25:30 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.AlertsTest - Running test: testSimpleAlert 14:25:30 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.BasePage - Capturing screenshot: target/screenshots/simple_alert_before_20260323_142530.png 14:25:30 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.BasePage - Screenshot saved and attached to Allure report: target/screenshots/simple_alert_before_20260323_142530.png 14:25:30 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.AlertsPage - Setting up alert listener and clicking alert button 14:25:30 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.AlertsPage - Alert appeared with message: You clicked a button 14:25:30 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.AlertsPage - Alert accepted successfully 14:25:30 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.BasePage - Capturing screenshot: target/screenshots/simple_alert_after_20260323_142530.png 14:25:30 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.BasePage - Screenshot saved and attached to Allure report: target/screenshots/simple_alert_after_20260323_142530.png 14:25:30 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.AlertsTest - ✅ Simple alert accepted successfully 14:25:30 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.AlertsTest - Closing page after test

testcase.name: testPromptInput
testcase.system-out: 14:25:30 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.AlertsTest - Creating new page and navigating to Alerts page 14:25:30 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.AlertsPage - Initializing AlertsPage locators 14:25:30 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.AlertsPage - Navigating to Alerts page 14:25:32 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.AlertsTest - Running test: testPromptInput 14:25:32 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.BasePage - Capturing screenshot: target/screenshots/prompt_alert_before_20260323_142532.png 14:25:32 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.BasePage - Screenshot saved and attached to Allure report: target/screenshots/prompt_alert_before_20260323_142532.png 14:25:32 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.AlertsPage - Setting up prompt listener - will type: Susan 14:25:32 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.AlertsPage - Prompt appeared: Please enter your name 14:25:32 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.BasePage - Capturing screenshot: target/screenshots/prompt_alert_after_20260323_142532.png 14:25:32 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.BasePage - Screenshot saved and attached to Allure report: target/screenshots/prompt_alert_after_20260323_142532.png 14:25:32 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.AlertsPage - Prompt result: You entered Susan 14:25:32 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.AlertsTest - ✅ Prompt input verified 14:25:32 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.AlertsTest - Closing page after test

testcase.name: testConfirmDismiss
testcase.system-out: 14:25:32 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.AlertsTest - Creating new page and navigating to Alerts page 14:25:32 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.AlertsPage - Initializing AlertsPage locators 14:25:32 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.AlertsPage - Navigating to Alerts page 14:25:34 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.AlertsTest - Running test: testConfirmDismiss 14:25:34 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.AlertsPage - Setting up confirm listener - will click Cancel 14:25:34 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.AlertsPage - Confirm box appeared: Do you confirm action? 14:25:34 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.BasePage - Capturing screenshot: target/screenshots/confirm_alert_after_dismiss_20260323_142534.png 14:25:34 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.BasePage - Screenshot saved and attached to Allure report: target/screenshots/confirm_alert_after_dismiss_20260323_142534.png 14:25:34 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.AlertsPage - Confirm result: You selected Cancel 14:25:34 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.AlertsTest - ✅ Confirm dismissed - result verified 14:25:34 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.AlertsTest - Closing page after test

testcase.name: testConfirmAccept
testcase.system-out: 14:25:34 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.AlertsTest - Creating new page and navigating to Alerts page 14:25:34 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.AlertsPage - Initializing AlertsPage locators 14:25:34 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.AlertsPage - Navigating to Alerts page 14:25:36 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.AlertsTest - Running test: testConfirmAccept 14:25:36 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.BasePage - Capturing screenshot: target/screenshots/confirm_alert_before_20260323_142536.png 14:25:36 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.BasePage - Screenshot saved and attached to Allure report: target/screenshots/confirm_alert_before_20260323_142536.png 14:25:36 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.AlertsPage - Setting up confirm listener - will click OK 14:25:36 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.AlertsPage - Confirm box appeared: Do you confirm action? 14:25:36 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.BasePage - Capturing screenshot: target/screenshots/confirm_alert_after_accept_20260323_142536.png 14:25:37 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.BasePage - Screenshot saved and attached to Allure report: target/screenshots/confirm_alert_after_accept_20260323_142536.png 14:25:37 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.AlertsPage - Confirm result: You selected Ok 14:25:37 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.AlertsTest - ✅ Confirm accepted - result verified 14:25:37 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.AlertsTest - Closing page after test
